name: nfl team league seasonlogs fields
description: Test case for nfl team league seasonlogs fields
expected_query: with "current_week_opponents" as (select "h" as "nfl_team", "v" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE' union select "v" as "nfl_team", "h" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE') select "player"."pid", "tf8de8b452c5328170f28af2fd3c5b6f2"."points" AS "league_nfl_team_seasonlogs_points_0", "t9bd8dc189b8b6a0b23b50f09f6fe0bb7"."points" AS "league_nfl_team_seasonlogs_points_1", "ta091f9b442e5ed6ba3af81ee23a2e319"."points" AS "league_nfl_team_seasonlogs_points_2", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "current_week_opponents" on "player"."current_nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."nfl_team" left join "league_nfl_team_seasonlogs" as "tf8de8b452c5328170f28af2fd3c5b6f2" on "tf8de8b452c5328170f28af2fd3c5b6f2"."nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" and "tf8de8b452c5328170f28af2fd3c5b6f2"."lid" = 1 and "tf8de8b452c5328170f28af2fd3c5b6f2"."stat_key" = 'DST_AGAINST_ADJ_LAST_FOUR' left join "league_nfl_team_seasonlogs" as "t9bd8dc189b8b6a0b23b50f09f6fe0bb7" on "t9bd8dc189b8b6a0b23b50f09f6fe0bb7"."nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" and "t9bd8dc189b8b6a0b23b50f09f6fe0bb7"."lid" = 1 and "t9bd8dc189b8b6a0b23b50f09f6fe0bb7"."stat_key" = 'DST_AGAINST_ADJ_LAST_EIGHT' left join "league_nfl_team_seasonlogs" as "ta091f9b442e5ed6ba3af81ee23a2e319" on "ta091f9b442e5ed6ba3af81ee23a2e319"."nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" and "ta091f9b442e5ed6ba3af81ee23a2e319"."lid" = 1 and "ta091f9b442e5ed6ba3af81ee23a2e319"."stat_key" = 'DST_AGAINST_ADJ' where player.primary_position IN ('DST') group by "current_week_opponents"."opponent", "tf8de8b452c5328170f28af2fd3c5b6f2"."points", "t9bd8dc189b8b6a0b23b50f09f6fe0bb7"."points", "ta091f9b442e5ed6ba3af81ee23a2e319"."points", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
